zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian Lenthall於1503年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾金哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Lenthall Esq.28歲，母親Elizabeth Wyllie17歲。她於1523年與Bartholomew Pigot在英國英格蘭奧可福爾素斯 奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1548年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿斯頓 盧萬特享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian Lenthall于1503年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾金哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Lenthall Esq.28岁，母亲Elizabeth Wyllie17岁。她于1523年与Bartholomew Pigot在英国英格兰奧可福爾素斯 奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1548年在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿斯頓 盧萬特享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lenthall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: nickname, perhaps from Middle English, Old French lentil ‘lentil’, perhaps given to someone who grew or sold lentil seeds, used in cooking.

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Julian Lenthall was born in 1503, in Kingham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Lenthall Esq., was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Wyllie, was 17. She married Bartholomew Pigot in 1523, in South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1548, in Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julian Lenthall est née en 1503, à Kingham, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Lenthall Esq., avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wyllie, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Bartholomew Pigot en 1523, à South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1548, à Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julian Lenthall 1503 in Kingham, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Lenthall Esq. 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Wyllie 17. Sie hat 1523 in South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Bartholomew Pigot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1548 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Lenthall è nata il nel 1503 nel Kingham, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Lenthall Esq., aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Wyllie, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Bartholomew Pigot nel 1523, nel South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1548, nel Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Julian Lenthallが1503年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアキンガムで生まれた時，父Thomas Lenthall Esq.は28歳，母Elizabeth Wyllieは17歳であった。1523年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアソウス オクスフォードシュアイアでBartholomew Pigotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1548年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアストン ロワントで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Julian Lenthall(이)가 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 킨그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Lenthall Esq.(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wyllie(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 소우스 스퍼드실르에서 Bartholomew Pigot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애스턴 로완트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Lenthall nasceu em 1503, em Kingham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Lenthall Esq., tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wyllie, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Bartholomew Pigot em 1523, em South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1548, em Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian Lenthall родилась в 1503 г. в местности кингхам, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Lenthall Esq. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wyllie, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bartholomew Pigot в 1523 г. в местности соут оксфордшир, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1548 г. в местности астон роуант, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julian Lenthall nació en 1503, en Kingham, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Lenthall Esq., tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wyllie, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Bartholomew Pigot en 1523, en South Oxfordshire, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1548, en Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
